channel.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2022
item.description:
Strings

  • Portable ASCIIstars353 - A library to convert strings to ascii.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jun 27th - Jul 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Frameworks

  • Symfony - A set of reusable components and a web framework.

    • Security

  • PHPGGCstars2.4k - A library of PHP unserializable payloads along with a tool to generate them.

    • Testing

  • Foundrystars450 - A fixture factory generation library for Doctrine.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php May 30th - Jun 5th, 2022
item.description:
Software

Infrastructure

  • RoadRunnerstars6.8k - High-performance PHP application server, load-balancer and process manager.

    • Static Analysis

  • Deptracstars2.1k - A static code analysis tool that helps to enforce rules for dependencies between software layers.

    • Architectural

  • Design Patterns PHPstars20.8k - A repository of software patterns implemented in PHP.
  • Patchwork - A library for redefining userland functions.

    • Asset Management

  • Laravel Mixstars5.1k - An elegant wrapper around Webpack for the 80% use case.

    • Database

  • Doctrine Extensionsstars3.8k - A collection of Doctrine behavioural extensions.

    • Configuration

    Extensions

  • Zephirstars3.1k - A compiled language between PHP and C++ for developing PHP extensions.

    • Micro Frameworks

  • Lumen - A micro-framework by Laravel.

    • Email

  • Stampiestars287 - A library for email services such as SendGrid, PostMark, MailGun and MailChimp.

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • Concrete5 - A CMS targeting users with a minimum of technical skills.
  • Magento - The most popular ecommerce platform.
  • Pico CMS - A stupidly simple, blazing fast, flat file CMS.

    • Components

  • Aura - Independent components, fully decoupled from each other and from any framework.

    • Static Site Generators

  • Jigsaw - Simple static sites with Laravel's Blade.

    • HTTP

  • Requestsstars3.5k - A simple HTTP library.

    • Testing

  • Mink - Web acceptance testing.
  • Phakestars467 - Another mock object library for testing.

    • Continuous Integration

  • Shippable - A Docker based continious integration platform for open source and private projects.

    • Documentation

  • phpDox - A documentation generator for PHP projects (that is not limited to API documentation).

    • Debugging and Profiling

  • Blackfire.io - A low-overhead code profiler.

    • Search

  • Solarium - A client library for Solr.

    • Serverless

  • OpenWhisk - An open-source serverless cloud platform.
  • Serverless Framework - An open-source framework for building serverless applications.

    • Resources

    PHP Websites

  • PHP Annotated Monthly - A monthly digest of PHP news.
  • PHP Weekly - A weekly PHP newsletter.

    • Resources

    PHP Podcasts

  • PHP Roundtable - The PHP Roundtable is a casual gathering of developers discussing topics that PHP nerds care about.

    • Resources

    PHP Newsletters

  • PHP Weekly - A weekly newsletter about PHP.

    • Resources

    PHP Internals Reading

  • PHP Internals Book - An online book about PHP internals, written by three core developers.

    • API

  • Janestars424 - An OpenApi client generator with validation support.

    • Templating

  • Latte - The safest and truly intuitive templates for PHP.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Apr 4th - Apr 10th, 2022
item.description:
Framework Extras

  • Livewire - A full-stack framework for Laravel that takes the pain out of building dynamic UIs.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Nov 8th - Nov 14th, 2021
item.description:
JSON

  • JSONMapperstars148 - A library for mapping JSON to PHP objects.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Oct 18th - Oct 24th, 2021
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • Adminer - Database management in a single PHP file.
  • Cachetstars12.9k - The open source status page system.
  • Lycheestars6.1k - An easy to use and great looking photo-management-system.
  • PHP Queuestars646 - An application for managing queueing backends.
  • phpRedisAdminstars2.9k - A simple web interface to manage Redis databases.
  • PHPSandbox - An online IDE for PHP in the browser.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Aug 16th - Aug 22nd, 2021
item.description:
Dependency Management Extras

  • Composer Normalizestars843 - A plugin for normalising composer.json files.
  • Composer Merge Pluginstars834 - A composer plugin to merge several composer.json files.
  • Composer Require Checkerstars698 - CLI tool to analyze composer dependencies and verify that no unknown symbols are used in the sources of a package.
  • Toolystars100 - A library to manage PHAR files in project using Composer.

    • JSON

  • JSON Lintstars1.3k - A JSON lint utility.

    • Resources

    PHP Reading

  • php[architect] - A monthly magazine dedicated to PHP.

    • Debugging and Profiling

  • Metricsstars313 - A simple metrics API library.

    • Build Tools

  • RMTstars441 - A library for versioning and releasing software.

    • Geolocation

  • Country Liststars5k - A list of all countries with names and ISO 3166-1 codes.

    • Database

  • Slimdumpstars176 - An easy dumper tool for MySQL.

    • Markup and CSS

  • Essencestars765 - A library for extracting web media.
  • Emberastars305 - An Oembed consumer library.
  • VObjectstars527 - A library for parsing VCard and iCalendar objects.
  • Shiki PHPstars224 - A Shikistars3.9k code highlighting package in PHP.
  • PHP CSS Parserstars1.6k - A Parser for CSS Files written in PHP.

    • Caching and Locking

  • Lockstars867 - A lock library to provide exclusive execution.

    • Configuration

    Miscellaneous

  • Annotationsstars6.5k - An annotation library (part of Doctrine).
  • Hprose-PHPstars2k - A cross-language RPC.

    • Software

    Development Environment

  • Exposestars3.9k - An open source PHP tunneling service.
  • Lando - Push-button development environments.
  • Takeoutstars1.4k - A Docker-based development-only dependency manager.

    • Numbers

  • IPstars220 - An immutable value object for working with IPv4 and IPv6 addresses.
  • MathPHPstars2.1k - A math library for PHP.

    • Event

  • Pawlstars524 - An asynchronous web socket client.

    • Authentication and Authorization

  • Pasetostars3.1k - Platform-Agnostic Security Tokens.

    • Scraping

  • Chrome PHPstars1.6k - Instrument headless Chrome/Chromium instances from PHP.

    • Dependency Management

  • Phive - A PHAR manager.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jun 28th - Jul 4th, 2021
item.description:
Software

Development Environment

  • Docker PHP Extension Installerstars2.6k - Easily install PHP extensions in Docker containers.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Dependency Management Extras

  • Composer Unusedstars1.1k - A CLI Tool to scan for unused composer packages.

    • Code Quality

  • CaptainHookstars786 - An easy-to-use and flexible Git hook library.

    • Numbers

  • DecimalObjectstars14 - A value object to handle decimals/floats easily and more precisely.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
Search

  • SphinxQL Query Builder - A query library for the Sphinx and Manticore search engines.

    • Code Analysis

  • GrumPHPstars3.8k - A PHP code-quality tool.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2021
item.description:
Resources

PHP Videos

  • Laravel YouTube Channel - The official Laravel YouTube channel.
  • SymfonyCasts - Screencasts and tutorials about PHP and Symfony.

    • Dependency Management Extras

  • Composer Patchesstars1.3k - A plugin for Composer to apply patches.

    • Testing

  • PHP MySQL Enginestars521 - A MySQL engine written in pure PHP.

    • Resources

    PHP Websites

  • Laravel News - The official Laravel blog.
  • PHP Watch - PHP articles, news, upcoming changes, RFCs and more.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Nov 16th - Nov 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Testing

  • Fakerstars2.6k - A fake data generator library.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Components

  • Symfony Components - The components that make Symfony.

    • Software

    Text Editors and IDEs

  • Apache NetBeans - An IDE with support for PHP and HTML5.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2020
item.description:
Dependency Injection

  • PHP-DI - A dependency injection container that supports autowiring.

    • Build Tools

  • Boxstars837 - A utility to build PHAR files.

    • NoSQL

  • Predisstars7.2k - A feature complete Redis library.

    • Software

    Web Applications

  • DBVstars1.7k - A database version control application.

    • Resources

    PHP Books

  • Modern PHP New Features and Good Practices - A book about new PHP features and best practices by Josh Lockhart.

    • Testing

  • Pest - A testing framework with a focus on simplicity.

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • CraftCMSstars2.9k - A flexible, user-friendly CMS for creating custom digital experiences on the web and beyond.
  • Moodle - An open-source learning platform.
  • Statamic - Build beautiful, easy to manage websites.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • Kirby - A flat-file CMS that adapts to any project.

    • Components

  • Spatie Open Source - A collection of open source PHP and Laravel packages.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jul 13th - Jul 19th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

PHP Books

  • Domain-Driven Design in PHP - Real examples written in PHP showcasing DDD Architectural Styles.

    • Debugging and Profiling

  • PCOVstars596 - A self contained code coverage compatible driver.
  • Symfony VarDumperstars7k - A variable dumper component.
  • Whoopsstars12.8k - A pretty error handling library.

    • Email

  • PHP IMAPstars1.5k - A library to access mailboxes via POP3, IMAP and NNTP.

    • Security

  • Zap - An integrated penetration testing tool for web applications.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

PHP Internals Reading

  • PHP RFCs - The home of PHP RFCs (Request for Comments).

    • Testing

  • Infectionstars1.8k - An AST-based PHP Mutation testing framework.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2020
item.description:
Frameworks

  • Spiral - A high performance PHP/Go framework.

    • Resources

    PHP Podcasts

  • PHP Internals News - A podcast about PHP internals.

    • Resources

    PHP Internals Reading

  • Externals - PHP internal discussions.
  • PHP RFC Watch - Watch the latest PHP RFCs.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php May 25th - May 31st, 2020
item.description:
Asset Management

  • Symfony Assetstars2.9k - Manages URL generation and versioning of web assets.
  • Symfony Encorestars2.1k - A simple but powerful API for processing and compiling assets built around Webpack.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php May 18th - May 24th, 2020
item.description:
Code Analysis

  • Phpactorstars822 - PHP completion, refactoring and introspection tool.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php May 11th - May 17th, 2020
item.description:
Configuration

  • Yo! Symfony TOMLstars173 - A PHP parser for TOMLstars17.5k.

    • Strings

  • Stringystars140 - A string manipulation library with multibyte support.

    • Files

  • Flysystemstars12.7k - Abstraction for local and remote filesystems.

    • Frameworks

  • Laravel - A web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax.
  • Nette - A web framework comprised of mature components.
  • Yii2stars14k - A fast, secure, and efficient web framework.
  • Laminas - A framework comprised of individual components (previously Zend Framework).
  • CakePHP - A rapid application development framework.

    • Resources

    PHP Podcasts

  • Laravel Podcast - Laravel and PHP development news and discussion.

    • Software

    Virtual Machines

  • PeachPiestars2.1k - PHP compiler and runtime for .NET and .NET Core.

    • Documentation

  • daux.iostars711 - A documentation generator which uses Markdown files.

    • Event

  • ReactPHPstars8.4k - An event driven non-blocking I/O library.
  • CakePHP Eventstars21 - An event dispatcher library.

    • Micro Frameworks

  • Sillystars848 - A micro-framework for CLI applications.
  • Mezzio - A micro-framework by Laminas.

    • Streams

  • ByteStream - An asynchronous stream abstraction.

    • Queue

  • Enqueuestars2.1k - A message queue packages for PHP that supports RabbitMQ, AMQP, STOMP, Amazon SQS, Redis and Doctrine transports.

    • Software

    PHP Installation

  • HomeBrew - A package manager for OSX.
  • Laravel Valet - A development environment for macOS.

    • Software

    Development Environment

  • Laravel Homestead - A local development environment for Laravel.
  • Puppet - A server automation framework and application.
  • Vagrant - A portable development environment utility.
  • Laradock - A full PHP development environment based on Docker.

    • HTTP

  • Nyholm PSR-7stars945 - A super lightweight PSR-7 implementation. Very strict and very fast.
  • Laminas Diactorosstars332 - PSR-7 HTTP Message implementation.

    • Middlewares

  • PSR-7 Middlewaresstars657 - Inspiring collection of handy middlewares.
  • Laminas Stratigilitystars43 - Middleware for PHP built on top of PSR-7.
  • Stack - A library of stackable middleware for Symfony.

    • Email

  • Symfony Mailerstars1.1k - A powerful library for creating and sending emails.

    • Resources

    PHP Videos

  • Laracasts - Screencasts about Laravel, Vue JS and more.

    • Database

  • CakePHP ORMstars146 - Object-Relational Mapper, implemented using the DataMapper pattern.
  • Laravel Eloquentstars2.5k - A simple ORM.

    • Filtering and Validation

  • CakePHP Validationstars39 - Another validation library.

    • Caching and Locking

  • CakePHP Cachestars49 - A caching library.
  • Laminas Cachestars62 - Another caching library.

    • Data Structure and Storage

  • CakePHP Collectionstars84 - A simple collections library.
  • Laminas Serializerstars27 - Another library for serialising and de-serialising data.

    • Internationalisation and Localisation

  • CakePHP I18nstars27 - Message translation and localization for dates and numbers.

    • Components

  • Laravel Components - The Laravel Framework components.
  • Laminas Components - The components that make the Laminas Framework.

    • Dependency Injection

  • Symfony DIstars3.8k - A dependency injection container component.

    • API

  • Laminas API Tool Skeletonstars41 - An API builder built with the Laminas Framework.

    • Testing

  • Behat - A behaviour driven development (BDD) testing framework.

    • Continuous Integration

  • Jenkins - A continuous integration platform with PHP support.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php May 4th - May 10th, 2020
item.description:
Configuration

Third Party APIs

  • AsyncAWS - An unofficial asynchronous PHP AWS SDK.

    • Security

  • SQLMapstars24.9k - An automatic SQL injection and database takeover tool.

    • Dependency Management Extras

  • Repman - A private PHP package repository manager and Packagist proxy.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Mar 16th - Mar 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Continuous Integration

  • GitlabCi - Let GitLab CI test, build, deploy your code. TravisCi like.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020
item.description:
Micro Frameworks

  • Laravel-Zero - A micro-framework for console applications.

    • Framework Extras

  • LaravelSstars3.6k - Glue for using Swoole in Laravel or Lumen.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:
Database

  • Cycle ORMstars1.1k - PHP DataMapper, ORM.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Scraping

  • DiDOMstars2k - A super fast HTML scrapper and parser.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Feb 3rd - Feb 9th, 2020
item.description:

Third Party APIs

  • Squarestars115 - The official Square PHP SDK for payments and other Square APIs.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Code Analysis

  • Rectorstars6.1k - A tool to upgrade and refactor code.

    • Markup and CSS

  • CommonMark PHPstars2.4k - Highly-extensible Markdown parser which fully supports the CommonMark spec.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jan 6th - Jan 12th, 2020
item.description:
Data Structure and Storage

  • JSON Machinestars760 - Provides iteration over huge JSONs using simple foreach

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Dec 30th - Jan 5th, 2019
item.description:
Static Analysis

  • PHP Architecture Testerstars742 - Easy to use architecture testing tool for PHP.

    • Configuration

    Miscellaneous

  • Safestars2.1k - All PHP functions, rewritten to throw exceptions instead of returning false.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Dec 9th - Dec 15th, 2019
item.description:
Documentation

  • PHP Documentor 2stars3.7k - A documentation generator.

    • Filtering and Validation

  • JSON Schemastars3.3k - A JSON Schema validation library.

    • Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • WordPress - A blogging platform and CMS.

    • Serverless

  • Laravel Vapor - A serverless deployment platform for Laravel, powered by AWS.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Oct 28th - Nov 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Continuous Integration

  • Setup PHPstars2.3k - A GitHub Action for PHP.

    • Strings

  • Portable UTF-8stars470 - A string manipulation library with UTF-8 safe replacement methods.

    • Navigation

  • Menustars645 - A flexible menu library with a fluent interface.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
Event

  • PHP Deferstars241 - Golang's defer statement for PHP.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Sep 30th - Oct 6th, 2019
item.description:
Frameworks

  • Phalcon - A framework implemented as a C extension.

    • Debugging and Profiling

  • Z-Ray - A debug and profile tool for Zend Server.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jul 22nd - Jul 28th, 2019
item.description:
Software

Virtual Machines

  • Hack - A programming language for HHVM.

    • Office

  • PHPSpreadsheetstars11.6k - A pure PHP library for reading and writing spreadsheet files (successor of PHPExcel).
  • Spoutstars4.2k - Read and write spreadsheet files (CSV, XLSX and ODS), in a fast and scalable way .

    • Event

  • Workermanstars10.1k - An event driven non-blocking I/O library.
  • Swoolestars17.6k - An event-driven asynchronous and concurrent networking communication framework with high performance for PHP written in C.

    • HTTP

  • Symfony HTTP Clientstars1.6k - A component to fetch HTTP resources synchronously or asynchronously.

    • Configuration

  • PHP Dotenvstars12.2k - Parse and load environment variables from .env files.
  • Symfony Dotenvstars3.4k- Parse and load environment variables from .env files.

    • Debugging and Profiling

  • PHPSpystars1.3k - A low-overhead sampling profiler.
  • Tideways.io - Monitoring and profiling tool.

    • Scraping

  • Symfony Pantherstars2.6k - A browser testing and web crawling library for PHP and Symfony.

    • Serverless

  • Bref - Serverless PHP on AWS Lambda.

    • Resources

    PHP Videos

  • Taking PHP Seriously - A talk outlining PHP's strengths by Keith Adams of Facebook.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php May 6th - May 12th, 2019
item.description:
Content Management Systems (CMS)

  • Backdrop - A CMS targeting small-to-medium sized business and non-profits (a fork of Drupal).
  • Gravstars13.5k - A modern flat-file CMS.
  • Drupal - An enterprise level CMS.
  • Joomla - Another leading CMS.

    • Data Structure and Storage

  • msgpack.phpstars366 - A pure PHP implementation of the MessagePack serialization format.

    • Filtering and Validation

  • ISO-codesstars763 - A library for validating inputs according standards from ISO, International Finance, Public Administrations, GS1, Book Industry, Phone numbers & Zipcodes for many countries.

    • Testing

  • VFS Streamstars1.3k - A virtual filesystem stream wrapper for testing.

    • Continuous Integration

  • PHPCIstars2.4k - An open source continuous integration platform for PHP.

    • Code Quality

  • PHP Mess Detectorstars2.1k - A library that scans code for bugs, sub-optimal code, unused parameters and more.

    • Composer Repositories

  • Firegento - Magento Module Composer Repository.

    • Framework Extras

  • Knp RAD Components - A set of Rapid Application Development (RAD) components for Symfony.

    • Templating

  • PHPTAL - A PHP implementation of the TAL templating language.

    • HTTP

  • PHP VCR - A library for recording and replaying HTTP requests.

    • Files

  • PHP FFmpegstars4.3k - A wrapper for the FFmpeg video library.

    • Imagery

  • Imagine - An image manipulation library.

    • Passwords

  • phpass - A portable password hashing framework.

    • Static Analysis

  • PHPCompatibilitystars1.9k - A PHP compatibility checker for PHP CodeSniffer.

    • Architectural

  • Finite - A simple PHP finite state machine.

    • Debugging and Profiling

  • APM - Monitoring extension collecting errors and statistics into SQLite/MySQL/StatsD.

    • Task Runners

  • Bldr - A PHP Task runner built on Symfony components.
  • Task - A pure PHP task runner inspired by Grunt and Gulp.

    • Geolocation

  • GeoCoder - A geocoding library.

    • Date and Time

  • CalendR - A calendar management library.

    • Queue

  • Pheanstalkstars1.9k - A Beanstalkd client library.

    • Authentication and Authorization

  • OAuth2 Server - Another OAuth2 server implementation.
  • OAuth2 Server - An OAuth2 authentication server, resource server and client library.

    • Configuration

    Third Party APIs

  • Campaign Monitor - The official Campaign Monitor PHP library.

    • Configuration

    Extensions

  • PHP CPP - A C++ library for developing PHP extensions.

    • Software

    Text Editors and IDEs

  • PhpStorm - A commercial PHP IDE.

    • Resources

    PHP Websites

  • libs.garden: PHP - An overview of fastest growing PHP libraries.
  • PHP Security - A guide to PHP security.
  • PHP The Right Way - A PHP best practice quick reference guide.
  • PHP UG - A website to help people locate their nearest PHP user group (UG).

    • Resources

    PHP Books

  • Scaling PHP Applications - An ebook about scaling PHP applications by Steve Corona.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Nov 5th - Nov 11th, 2018
item.description:
Numbers

  • Brick\Mathstars1.4k - A library providing large number support: BigInteger, BigDecimal and BigRational.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Security

  • Symfony Security Monitoring - A web tool to check your Composer dependencies for security advisories, previously known as "SensioLabs Security Check".

item.description:
Software

PHP Installation

  • Brew PHP Switcherstars852 - Brew PHP switcher.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jun 11th - Jun 17th, 2018
item.description:
Database

  • Doctrine - A comprehensive DBAL and ORM.

    • Migrations

  • Doctrine Migrations - A migration library for Doctrine.

    • Software

    Infrastructure

  • appserver.iostars949 - A multithreaded application server for PHP, written in PHP.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jun 4th - Jun 10th, 2018
item.description:
Static Analysis

  • Psalmstars4.9k - A static analysis tool for finding errors in PHP applications.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Mar 12th - Mar 18th, 2018
item.description:
Micro Framework Extras

  • Slim Twig Viewstars308 - Integrate Twig into Slim.
  • Slim PHP Viewstars231 - A simple PHP renderer for Slim.

    • Event

  • RxPHPstars1.6k - A reactive extension library.

    • Configuration

    Third Party APIs

  • Githubstars2k - A library to interface with the Github API.

    • Testing

  • ParaTeststars2k - A parallel testing library for PHPUnit.

    • E-commerce

  • Sylius - An open source e-commerce solution.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Feb 19th - Feb 25th, 2018
item.description:
Strings

  • Device Detectorstars2.3k - Another library for parsing user agent strings.

    • Resources

    PHP Websites

  • PHP FIG - The PHP Framework Interoperability Group.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Dec 11th - Dec 17th, 2017
item.description:
Code Analysis

  • Scrutinizer - A web tool to scrutinise PHP codestars443.

    • Code Quality

  • PHP CodeSnifferstars9.7k - A library that detects PHP, CSS and JS coding standard violations.
  • PHP CS Fixerstars11.4k - A coding standards fixer library.
  • PHPCheckstylestars156 - A tool to help adhere to certain coding conventions.
  • PHPCPDstars2.2k - A library that detects copied and pasted code.

    • Static Analysis

  • Exakatstars368 - A static analysis engine for PHP.
  • Mondrianstars391 - A code analysis tool using Graph Theory.
  • phanstars5.3k - A static analyzer based on PHP 7+ and the php-ast extension.
  • PhpDependencyAnalysisstars545 - A tool to create customisable dependency graphs.
  • PHP Metricsstars2.3k - A static metric library.
  • PHP Migrationstars194 - A static analyzer for PHP version migration.
  • PHPStanstars11.4k - A PHP Static Analysis Tool.

    • Software

    Text Editors and IDEs

  • VS Code - An open source code editor.

    • HTTP

  • HTTPlug - An HTTP client abstraction without binding to a specific implementation.

    • Database

  • Atlas.Ormstars428 - A data mapper implementation for your persistence model in PHP.
  • Aura.SqlQuerystars419 - Independent query builders for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and Microsoft SQL Server.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Nov 27th - Dec 3rd, 2017
item.description:
Configuration

Miscellaneous

  • BotManstars5.7k - A framework agnostic PHP library to build cross-platform chat bots.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Nov 20th - Nov 26th, 2017
item.description:
URL

  • sabre/uristars284 - A functional URI manipulation library.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Oct 30th - Nov 5th, 2017
item.description:
Architectural

  • Porterstars556 - Data import abstraction library for consuming Web APIs and other data sources.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Oct 16th - Oct 22nd, 2017
item.description:
E-commerce

  • Brick\Moneystars1.2k - A money library for PHP, with support for contexts, cash roundings, currency conversion.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Sep 4th - Sep 10th, 2017
item.description:
Database

  • RedBean - A lightweight, configuration-less ORM.

    • Resources

    PHP Books

  • Mastering Object-Orientated PHP - A book about object-orientated PHP by Brandon Savage.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jul 24th - Jul 30th, 2017
item.description:
Templating

  • Smarty - A template engine to complement PHP.
  • Twig - A comprehensive templating language.

    • Email

  • SwiftMailer - A mailer solution.

    • Dependency Injection

  • Pimple - A tiny dependency injection container.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jul 3rd - Jul 9th, 2017
item.description:
Command Line

  • GetOptstars321 - A command line opt parser.

    • Resources

    PHP Websites

  • Seven PHP - A website that interviews members of the PHP community.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jun 26th - Jul 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Migrations

  • Phinxstars4.3k - Another database migration library.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jun 12th - Jun 18th, 2017
item.description:
Caching and Locking

  • APIx Cachestars110 - A thin PSR-6 cache wrapper to various caching backends emphasising cache tagging and indexing.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php May 8th - May 14th, 2017
item.description:
Dependency Injection

  • Acclimatestars217 - A common interface to dependency injection containers and service locators.

    • Security

  • random_compatstars8k - PHP 5.x support for random_bytes() and random_int()

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Apr 24th - Apr 30th, 2017
item.description:
Testing

  • Mockerystars10.3k - A mock object library for testing.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Apr 17th - Apr 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Composer Repositories

  • Packagist - The PHP Package Repository.
  • Private Packagist - Composer package archive as a service for PHP.
  • WordPress Packagist - Manage your plugins with Composer.

    • Dependency Management

  • Composer - A package and dependency manager.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Apr 3rd - Apr 9th, 2017
item.description:
Micro Frameworks

  • Radarstars53 - An Action-Domain-Responder implementation for PHP.

    • Routers

  • Aura.Routerstars466 - A full-featured routing library.

    • Dependency Injection

  • Aura.Distars342 - A serializable dependency injection container with constructor and setter injection, interface and trait awareness, configuration inheritance, and much more.

    • Database

  • Aura.Sqlstars527 - Provides an extension to the native PDO along with a profiler and connection locator.
  • Spot2stars603 - A MySQL datamapper ORM.

    • Command Line

  • Aura.Clistars103 - Provides the equivalent of request ( Context ) and response ( Stdio ) objects for the command line interface, including Getopt support, and an independent Help object for describing commands.

    • Authentication and Authorization

  • Aura.Authstars125 - Provides authentication functionality and session tracking using various adapters.

    • Filtering and Validation

  • Aura.Filterstars151 - Provides tools to validate and sanitize objects and arrays.

    • Internationalisation and Localisation

  • Aura.Intlstars84 - Provides internationalization (I18N) tools, specifically package-oriented per-locale message translation.

    • Resources

    PHP Websites

  • PHP Package Development Standards - Package development standards for PHP.
  • PHP School - Open Source Learning for PHP.

    • Resources

    PHP Books

  • Modernizing Legacy Applications in PHP - A book about modernizing legacy PHP applications by Paul M. Jones.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Mar 13th - Mar 19th, 2017
item.description:
Authentication and Authorization

  • TwitterOAuthstars4.2k - A Twitter OAuth library.
  • SocialConnect Authstars508 - An open source social sign (OAuth1\OAuth2\OpenID\OpenIDConnect).

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Mar 6th - Mar 12th, 2017
item.description:
Dependency Injection

  • Discostars137 - A PSR-11 compatible, annotation-based dependency injection container.

    • Debugging and Profiling

  • Kintstars2.6k - A debugging and profiling tool.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Feb 27th - Mar 5th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

PHP Books

  • Functional Programming in PHP - This book will show you how to leverage these new PHP5.3+ features by understanding functional programming principles

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:
Components

  • CakePHP Plugins - A directory of CakePHP plugins.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Dec 19th - Dec 25th, 2016
item.description:
Date and Time

  • Yasumistars896 - An library to help you calculate the dates and names of holidays.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Dec 12th - Dec 18th, 2016
item.description:
Event

  • Broadwaystars1.4k - An event source and CQRS library.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Nov 28th - Dec 4th, 2016
item.description:
Resources

PHP Podcasts

  • PHP Town Hall - A casual PHP podcast by Ben Edmunds and Phil Sturgeon.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Nov 21st - Nov 27th, 2016
item.description:
Files

  • UnifiedArchive - A unified reader and writer of compressed archives.

    • Micro Frameworks

  • Slim - Another simple micro framework.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Nov 14th - Nov 20th, 2016
item.description:
Software

Development Environment

  • Docker - A containerization platform.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Nov 7th - Nov 13th, 2016
item.description:
Code Analysis

  • Better Reflectionstars1.1k - AST-based reflection library that allows analysis and manipulation of code

    • Resources

    PHP Videos

  • Nomad PHP Lightning Talks - 10 to 15 minute Lightning Talks by PHP community members.

    • Resources

    PHP Podcasts

  • Voices of the ElePHPant Interviews with the people that make the PHP community special.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Oct 3rd - Oct 9th, 2016
item.description:
Caching and Locking

  • Metaphorestars102 - Cache slam defense using a semaphore to prevent dogpile effect.

    • Software

    PHP Installation

  • PHP OSX - A PHP installer for OSX.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Sep 19th - Sep 25th, 2016
item.description:
Testing

  • Kahlanstars1.1k - Full stack Unit/BDD testing framework with built-in stub, mock and code-coverage support.

    • Middlewares

  • Relaystars297 - A PHP 5.5 PSR-7 middleware dispatcher.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Sep 12th - Sep 18th, 2016
item.description:
Task Runners

  • Robostars2.5k - A PHP Task runner with object-orientated configurations.

    • Testing

  • PHP-Mockstars328 - A mock library for built-in PHP functions (e.g. time()).

    • Build Tools

  • Constructstars263 - A PHP project/micro-package generator.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Aug 22nd - Aug 28th, 2016
item.description:
Continuous Integration

  • CircleCI - A continuous integration platform.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Aug 8th - Aug 14th, 2016
item.description:
Security

  • VAddy - A continuous security testing platform for web applications.

    • Build Tools

  • Phing - A PHP project build system inspired by Apache Ant.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2016
item.description:
Date and Time

  • Chronosstars1.3k - A DateTime API extension supporting both mutable and immutable date/time.

Resources

PHP Books

  • PHP Pandas - A book about learning to write PHP by Dayle Rees.

Data Structure and Storage

  • Knapsackstars539 - Collection library inspired by Clojure's sequences.

Miscellaneous

  • noCAPTCHAstars339 - Helper for Google's noCAPTCHA (reCAPTCHA).

Code Analysis

  • Qafoo Quality Analyzerstars495 - A tool to visualize metrics and source code.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php May 2nd - May 8th, 2016
item.description:
Testing

  • PHPT - A test tool used by PHP itself.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Apr 18th - Apr 24th, 2016
item.description:
Data Structure and Storage

  • JsonMapperstars1.4k - A library that maps nested JSON structures onto PHP classes.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Apr 11th - Apr 17th, 2016
item.description:
Filtering and Validation

  • Assertstars2.3k - A validation library with a rich set of assertions. Supports assertion chaining and lazy assertions.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Apr 4th - Apr 10th, 2016
item.description:
Strings

  • Jieba-PHPstars1.2k - A PHP port of Python's jieba. Chinese text segmentation for natural language processing.
  • Agentstars4.1k - A PHP desktop/mobile user agent parser, based on Mobiledetect.
  • Mobile-Detectstars10.1k - A lightweight PHP class for detecting mobile devices (including tablets).
  • Patchwork UTF-8stars80 - A portable library for working with UTF-8 strings.
  • URLifystars659 - A PHP port of Django's URLify.js.
  • UUIDstars11.8k - A library for generating UUIDs.

    • Resources

    PHP Books

  • XML Parsing with PHP - This book covers parsing and validating XML documents, leveraging XPath expressions, and working with namespaces as well as how to create and modify XML files programmatically.
  • Signaling PHP - A book about catching PCNTL signals in CLI scripts by Cal Evans.
  • The Grumpy Programmer's Guide to Building Testable PHP Applications - A book about building testing PHP applications by Chris Hartjes.

    • Date and Time

  • Moment.phpstars944 - Moment.js inspired PHP DateTime handler with i18n support.

    • Architectural

  • RulerZstars864 - A powerful rule engine and implementation of the Specification pattern.

    • Dependency Management Extras

  • Composedstars49 - A library to parse your project's Composer environment at runtime.
  • Satisstars2.9k - A static Composer repository generator.
  • Toran Proxy - A static Composer repository and proxy.

    • Notifications

  • Php-pushwooshstars63 - A PHP Library to easily send push notifications with the Pushwoosh REST Web Services.
  • Notificatostars223 - A library for handling push notifications.

    • Queue

  • BunnyPHPstars628 - A performant pure-PHP AMQP (RabbitMQ) sync and also async (ReactPHP) library.
  • Thumperstars276 - A RabbitMQ pattern library.
  • Tarantool Queuestars62 - PHP bindings for Tarantool Queue.

    • Code Analysis

  • PHPQAstars539 - A tool for running QA tools (phploc, phpcpd, phpcs, pdepend, phpmd, phpmetrics).
  • Code Climate - An automated code review.
  • PHP Parserstars15.7k - A PHP parser written in PHP.
  • PHPLOCstars2.2k - A tool for quickly measuring the size of a PHP project.
  • UBenchstars555 - A simple micro benchmark library.

    • Event

  • Ratchetstars5.8k - A web socket library.

    • Logging

  • Monologstars19.9k - A comprehensive logger.

    • Migrations

  • Migrationsstars38 - A migration management library.
  • PHPMigstars559 - Another migration management library.

    • Command Line

  • Cilexstars623 - A micro framework for building command line tools.
  • CLI Menustars1.9k - A library for building CLI menus.
  • CLIFrameworkstars424 - A command-line framework supports zsh/bash completion generation, subcommands and option constraints. It also powers phpbrew.
  • CLImatestars1.8k - A library for outputting colours and special formatting.
  • GetOptionKitstars140 - Another command line opt parser.
  • PsySHstars9.4k - Another PHP REPL.
  • ShellWrapstars743 - A simple command line wrapper library.

    • Authentication and Authorization

  • Json Web Tokenstars6.8k - Json Tokens to authenticate and transmit information.
  • Opauthstars1.7k - A multi-provider authentication framework.
  • PHP oAuthLibstars1.1k - Another OAuth library.
  • Sentinel Social - A library for social network authentication.
  • Sentinel - A framework agnostic authentication & authorisation library.

    • Markup and CSS

  • Decodastars196 - A lightweight markup parser library.
  • Parsedownstars14.2k - Another Markdown parser.
  • PHP Markdownstars3.3k - A Markdown parser.

    • Numbers

  • PHP Conversionstars126 - Another library for converting between units of measure.
  • PHP Units of Measurestars21 - A library for converting between units of measure.

    • Deployment

  • Deployerstars9.6k - A deployment tool.
  • Rocketeerstars2.7k - A fast and easy deployer for the PHP world.

    • Configuration

    Third Party APIs

  • Mailgunstars1k The official Mailgun PHP API.
  • Stripestars3.2k - The official Stripe PHP library.
  • Twiliostars1.4k - The official Twilio PHP REST API.

    • Configuration

    Miscellaneous

  • ClassPreloaderstars355 - A library for optimising autoloading.
  • Pagerfantastars1.6k - A pagination library.
  • SuperClosurestars1.7k - A library that allows Closures to be serialized.

    • Software

    PHP Installation

  • PHP Buildstars947 - Another PHP version installer.

    • Resources

    PHP Websites

  • Nomad PHP - A online PHP learning resource.

    • Resources

    PHP Videos

  • Programming with Anthony - A video series by Anthony Ferrara.

    • Navigation

  • KnpMenustars1.3k - A menu library.

    • Continuous Integration

  • SemaphoreCI - A continuous integration platform for open source and private projects.
  • Travis CI - A continuous integration platform.

    • URL

  • Purlstars907 - A URL manipulation library.
  • Uristars855 - Another URL manipulation library.

    • Email

  • Email Reply Parserstars602 - An email reply parser library.
  • Fetchstars500 - An IMAP library.
  • PHPMailerstars18.8k - Another mailer solution.

    • Imagery

  • Intervention Imagestars12.9k - Another image manipulation library.
  • PHP Image Workshopstars856 - Another image manipulation library.

    • Testing

  • Alicestars2.4k - An expressive fixture generation library.
  • Codeceptionstars4.6k - A full stack testing framework.
  • HTTP Mockstars387 - A library for mocking HTTP requests in unit tests.
  • Peridotstars326 - An event driven test framework.
  • Phostars285 - Another behaviour driven development testing framework.
  • PHPSpecstars1.8k - A design by specification unit testing library.
  • PHPUnitstars18.7k - A unit testing framework.

    • HTTP

  • Guzzlestars22.1k - A comprehensive HTTP client.

    • Scraping

  • Embedstars1.9k - An information extractor from any web service or page.
  • Gouttestars9.1k - A simple web scraper.
  • PHP Spiderstars1.3k - A configurable and extensible PHP web spider.

    • Static Site Generators

  • Couscous - Couscous turns Markdown documentation into beautiful websites. It's GitHub Pages on steroids.
  • Sculpin - A tool that converts Markdown and Twig into static HTML.

    • Routers

  • Routestars602 - A routing library built on top of Fast Route.

    • Framework Extras

  • Symfony CMFstars734 - A Content Management Framework to create custom CMS.

    • Files

  • CSVstars3k - A CSV data manipulation library.
  • Gaufrettestars2.4k - A filesystem abstraction layer.

    • API

  • API Platform - Expose in minutes an hypermedia REST API that embraces JSON-LD, Hydra format.
  • Dreststars87 - A library for exposing Doctrine entities as REST resource endpoints.
  • Hateoasstars996 - A HATEOAS REST web service library.

    • Security

  • Halite - A simple library for encryption using libsodiumstars10.5k.
  • IniScanstars1.5k - A tool that scans PHP INI files for security.
  • Optimusstars1.2k - Id obfuscation based on Knuth's multiplicative hashing method.
  • PHP Encryptionstars3.5k - Secure PHP Encryption Library.
  • PHPSecLib - A pure PHP secure communications library.
  • RandomLibstars831 - A library for generating random numbers and strings.
  • TCryptostars56 - A simple encrypted key-value storage library.

    • Filtering and Validation

  • Filterusstars452 - A simple PHP filtering library.
  • MetaYamlstars100 - A schema validation library that supports YAML, JSON and XML.
  • Respect Validationstars5.6k - A simple validation library.
  • Uploadstars1.7k - A library for handling file uploads and validation.
  • Valitronstars1.5k - Another validation library.

    • Debugging and Profiling

  • PHP Consolestars522 - A web debugging console.
  • PHP Debug Bar - A debugging toolbar.
  • xDebugstars2.7k - A debug and profile tool for PHP.
  • XHProfstars2.5k - A profiling tool originally developed by Facebook.

    • Data Structure and Storage

  • PINQstars466 - A PHP library based on .NET's LINQ (Language Integrated Query).
  • YaLinqostars432 - Yet Another LINQ to Objects for PHP.

    • Search

  • ElasticSearch PHPstars5k - The official client library for ElasticSearch.

    • PDF

  • Dompdfstars9.1k - A HTML to PDF converter.

    • Passwords

  • GenPhrasestars111 - A library for generating secure random passphrases.
  • PHP Password Libstars371 - A library for generating and validating passwords.

    • Office

  • PHPWordstars6.4k - A library for working with Microsoft Word documents.

    • E-commerce

  • Moneystars4.1k - A PHP implementation of Fowler's money pattern.
  • Shopwarestars1.3k - Highly customizable e-commerce software

    • Caching and Locking

  • CacheToolstars1.4k - A tool to clear APC/opcode caches from the command line.
  • Doctrine Cachestars7.5k - A caching library.

item.description:

  • PHP AMQPstars4.1k - A pure PHP AMQP library.

  • Ansible - A radically simple orchestration framework.

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2016
item.description:
Software

Web Applications

  • phpMyAdminstars6.2k - A web interface for MySQL/MariaDB.
  • 3V4L - An online PHP & HHVM shell.

    • Debugging and Profiling

  • PHPBenchstars1.6k - A benchmarking Framework.

    • Resources

    PHP Books

  • PHP 7 Upgrade Guide - An ebook covering all of the features and changes in PHP 7 by Colin O'Dell.

    • Micro Framework Extras

  • Slim Skeletonstars1.5k - A skeleton for Slim.

    • Imagery

  • Color Extractorstars1.2k - A library for extracting colours from images.

    • Asset Management

  • JShrinkstars675 - A JavaScript minifier library.

    • Geolocation

  • GeoToolsstars1.3k - A library of geo-related tools.

    • PDF

  • WKHTMLToPDFstars12.7k - A tool to convert HTML to PDF.

    • Office

  • PHPPowerPointstars1.2k - A library for working with Microsoft PowerPoint Presentations.

    • Command Line

  • Borisstars2.2k - A tiny PHP REPL.

    • Caching and Locking

  • Stashstars943 - Another library for caching.

    • Data Structure and Storage

  • Fractalstars3.5k - A library for converting complex data structures to JSON output.

    • Software

    PHP Installation

  • PHP Brewstars5k - A PHP version manager and installer.

    • Software

    Virtual Machines

  • HHVMstars17.4k - A Virtual Machine, Runtime and JIT for PHP by Facebook.

    • Resources

    PHP Websites

  • PHP Best Practices - A PHP best practice guide.

    • Dependency Management Extras

  • Prestissimostars6.3k - A composer plugin which enables parallel install process.

  • Password Compatstars2.2k - A compatibility library for the new PHP 5.5 password functions.
  • Password Policystars74 - A password policy library for PHP and JavaScript.
  • Password Validatorstars143 - A library for validating and upgrading password hashes.

  • Barbushin PHP Consolestars1.4k - Another web debugging console using Google Chrome.
  • Tracystars1.6k - A simple error detection, logging and time measuring library.

  • ByteUnitsstars156 - A library to parse, format and convert byte units in binary and metric systems.

  • JoliCistars660 - A continuous integration client written in PHP and powered by Docker.

  • Securing PHP: Core Concepts - A book about common security terms and practices for PHP by Chris Cornutt.

    • Dependency Management

  • Picklestars1.6k - A PHP extension installer.

  • Cebe Markdownstars988 - An fast and extensible Markdown parser.

Strings

item.title: ziadoz/awesome-php May 26th - Jun 1st, 2014
item.description:
